# DropHunter AI

> DropHunter AI is a dropshipping product research platform. It helps sellers discover trending products, validate demand with Google Trends data, analyze Meta Ad Library competitors, calculate profit, vet suppliers (CJ Dropshipping, AliExpress), and manage a product pipeline.

## Product

- Name: DropHunter AI (TrendHunter)
- Category: E-commerce / dropshipping product research SaaS
- URL: https://drophunter.ai (update with your production domain)

## Key features

- Multi-marketplace Discover search (cached daily from free catalogs + optional live APIs)
- Google Trends Trend Pulse (demand momentum, rising queries)
- Meta Ad Library Ad Radar (active ads, advertiser count, creative hooks)
- AI product validation, competitor intelligence, market gap finder
- Social media kit (hashtags, hooks, ad copy, content calendar)
- Supplier offers and profit calculator
- Subscription plans: Trial, Starter, Pro, Business, Agency
- Live API credits per plan; cached data is free

## Public pages

- / — Landing page with pricing
- /trends/{keyword-slug} — Public trend reports (SEO)
- /register — Sign up
- /login — Sign in

## Data sources

- DummyJSON, FakeStore (free catalogs)
- Google Trends via SerpAPI (optional)
- Meta Ad Library API (optional)
- eBay Browse, SerpAPI Amazon/Google Shopping (optional, live credits)
- CJ Dropshipping, AliExpress (suppliers)
- Groq / OpenAI (AI features)

## Contact

See in-app billing and account settings for support.
